Vulcanization is the opposite of [[atomization]], it refers to the agglomeration of different people (atoms) and corporate groups (molecules) into larger more resilient structures.  

It is derived from the chemical process of [[w:vulcanization|vulcanization]] 
[[File:Vulcanization Process Picture1 V.1.svg|thumb|Diagram of chemical vulcanization]]
[[Category:The Pride]]
==See Also==
Other metaphors
* [[The Pride]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
